'''[[Javis]]''' was a planet in located in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector's]] [[Javis system/Legends|Javis system]].

[[Tampson Consolidated, Incorporated]] moved its headquarters from the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] to Javis and took a loan from [[House Mecetti]]. House Mecetti ensured Tampson defaulted on the loan, thus gaining control of the company.

{{Planet-stub}}
